'''鈭歞-sh-d''' ('''dashada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:champo|champo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:champo|champo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-sh-d
|-
! Lemma
| dashada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dashadithi|dashadithi]] || [[word:dashadiji|dashadiji]] || [[word:dashadishi|dashadishi]] || [[word:dashadi|dashadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashaduthuth|dashaduthuth]] || [[word:dashadujuj|dashadujuj]] || [[word:dashadushush|dashadushush]] || [[word:dashad|dashad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashaduthu|dashaduthu]] || [[word:dashaduju|dashaduju]] || [[word:dashadushu|dashadushu]] || [[word:dashadu|dashadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashadufuth|dashadufuth]] || [[word:dashadufuj|dashadufuj]] || [[word:dashadufush|dashadufush]] || [[word:dashaduf|dashaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dashadethe|dashadethe]] || [[word:dashadeje|dashadeje]] || [[word:dashadeshe|dashadeshe]] || [[word:dashade|dashade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashadothoth|dashadothoth]] || [[word:dashadojoj|dashadojoj]] || [[word:dashadoshosh|dashadoshosh]] || [[word:dashad|dashad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashadotho|dashadotho]] || [[word:dashadojo|dashadojo]] || [[word:dashadosho|dashadosho]] || [[word:dashado|dashado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashadofoth|dashadofoth]] || [[word:dashadofoj|dashadofoj]] || [[word:dashadofosh|dashadofosh]] || [[word:dashadof|dashadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dashad忙th忙|dashad忙th忙]] || [[word:dashad忙j忙|dashad忙j忙]] || [[word:dashad忙sh忙|dashad忙sh忙]] || [[word:dashad忙|dashad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashadathath|dashadathath]] || [[word:dashadajaj|dashadajaj]] || [[word:dashadashash|dashadashash]] || [[word:dashad|dashad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashadatha|dashadatha]] || [[word:dashadaja|dashadaja]] || [[word:dashadasha|dashadasha]] || [[word:dashada|dashada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashadafath|dashadafath]] || [[word:dashadafaj|dashadafaj]] || [[word:dashadafash|dashadafash]] || [[word:dashadaf|dashadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dashadasha|dashadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godashadasha|godashadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidashadasha|gokidashadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dashadn眉sha|dashadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godashadnkn眉sha|godashadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidashadn眉sha|gokidashadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dashadsh毛sha|dashadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godashadnksh毛sha|godashadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidashadsh毛sha|gokidashadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashadrosha|dashadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashadnkrosha|godashadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashadrosha|gokidashadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dashadmusha|dashadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godashadnkmusha|godashadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashadmusha|gokidashadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dashadsherasha|dashadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godashadnksherasha|godashadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidashadsherasha|gokidashadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dashadngasha|dashadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godashadnkngasha|godashadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidashadngasha|gokidashadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dashadyasha|dashadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godashadnkyasha|godashadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidashadyasha|gokidashadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dashadyamasha|dashadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godashadnkyamasha|godashadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidashadyamasha|gokidashadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dashadn眉sh毛sha|dashadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godashadnkn眉sh毛sha|godashadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidashadn眉sh毛sha|gokidashadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashadn眉rosha|dashadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashadnkn眉rosha|godashadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashadn眉rosha|gokidashadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashadn眉musha|dashadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashadnkn眉musha|godashadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashadn眉musha|gokidashadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dashadsh毛n眉sha|dashadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godashadnksh毛n眉sha|godashadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidashadsh毛n眉sha|gokidashadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashadsh毛rosha|dashadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashadnksh毛rosha|godashadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashadsh毛rosha|gokidashadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashadsh毛musha|dashadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashadnksh毛musha|godashadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashadsh毛musha|gokidashadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dashadron眉sha|dashadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godashadnkron眉sha|godashadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidashadron眉sha|gokidashadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dashadrosh毛sha|dashadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godashadnkrosh毛sha|godashadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidashadrosh毛sha|gokidashadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashadromusha|dashadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashadnkromusha|godashadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashadromusha|gokidashadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dashadmun眉sha|dashadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godashadnkmun眉sha|godashadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidashadmun眉sha|gokidashadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dashadmush毛sha|dashadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godashadnkmush毛sha|godashadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidashadmush毛sha|gokidashadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dashadmurosha|dashadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godashadnkmurosha|godashadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidashadmurosha|gokidashadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dashad|dashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙sh忙d|d忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodashad|hodashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙sh忙d|hod忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodashad|hohodashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙sh忙d|hohod忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dashad|n眉dashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙sh忙d|n眉d忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dashad|n眉n眉dashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙sh忙d|n眉n眉d忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dashad|n茂dashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙sh忙d|n茂d忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dashad|n茂n茂dashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙sh忙d|n茂n茂d忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludashad|ludashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙sh忙d|lud忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludashad|luludashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙sh忙d|lulud忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidashad|lidashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙sh忙d|lid忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidashad|lilidashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙sh忙d|lilid忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodashad|kodashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙sh忙d|kod忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodashad|kokodashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙sh忙d|kokod忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedashad|kedashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙sh忙d|ked忙sh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedashad|kekedashad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙sh忙d|keked忙sh忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
